Legal Yes/No Question Answering System.relationship_description: Ryosuke Taniguchi and Yoshinobu Kano are likely collaborators, as they are both mentioned in the context of a legal informatics research paper.

Case-Role Analysis.entity_description: A method used in legal informatics to analyze the roles of different entities in legal cases, aiding in the understanding and answering of legal questions.

2016.entity_description: The year in which the Tenth International Workshop on Juris-informatics took place, indicating the time frame of the research presented.
